name: @ringtail/cli
description: The 4th bucket, worked as a CLI: `ringtail`, the terminal you (or your coding agent) drive. Reads the project's .env.example manifest via @ringtail/core and prints the provisioning plan; `ringtail up` boots the daemon + opens the dashboard (stub); `--json` is agent mode (emits what's MISSING, never secret values). esbuild bundles src/cli.ts → dist/cli.js (shebang + chmod +x). type:package → imports libs only (@ringtail/core, @ringtail/config); terminal — nothing internal consumes it.

scripts.build:dashboard: (cd ../../apps/dashboard && bun run build) && rm -rf dist/dashboard && cp -r ../../apps/dashboard/dist dist/dashboard
scripts.prepack: bun run build && bun run build:dashboard

$publishConfig_comment: EXAMPLE ONLY — `private: true`, not actually published. `bun publish` (drop `private`) would ship `dist/` to npm as @ringtail/cli, installing the `ringtail` bin. `types` points at source for the example; a real publish adds `tsc --emitDeclarationOnly` for dist/index.d.ts.
